description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - Windows via Conda that runs on a weekly schedule and on push and pull request events, ignoring certain paths. The workflow should have a concurrency group and cancel in-progress jobs. It should have two jobs: build and check. The build job runs on a Windows environment with Conda, using a matrix strategy for different compilers, and performs a build, test, and install of Pinocchio. The check job runs on Ubuntu and checks if the build job succeeded.
